nodes.label: Flows
nodes.rationale: No-code, branching, button-driven WhatsApp conversation engine

nodes.label: Multi-user Accounts
nodes.rationale: Every wacrm install is multi-tenant on the database side

nodes.label: Inbox Doodle Background
nodes.rationale: WhatsApp-style doodle background for the inbox message area. 240x240 tile, repeats seamlessly via CSS background-repeat.

nodes.label: lucide-react
nodes.rationale: Icon shapes are taken verbatim from lucide-react (which the app already ships) so they sit visually consistent with every other icon in the UI.
